hero.headline: Modern websites built for small businesses
hero.supporting: Look professional online and make it easy for customers to request a quote—clean, custom sites built for your business, without expensive subscriptions or unnecessary complexity.

intro.title: A first impression that matches your work

body.text: Your website is often the first impression potential customers have of your business. From Fairfield, Maine, I build fast, tailored sites for small businesses across Mid-Maine—so you look professional, earn trust, and make it simple for people to get in touch.

Every project is scoped to your business and the audience you want to reach. Whether you are just getting started or refreshing your online presence, the goal is simple: a website you are proud to share—and that helps customers choose you.

localProof.title: Serving Mid-Maine
localProof.lead: Local-first from Fairfield—happy to work with businesses nearby and farther out when it is a good fit.
